{{Quote|Despite the Empire's claims, a number of ZQs still see service in the Outer Rim. The pacification of Hyrol Preen Beta (Portmoak sector) was accomplished quite handily by a combination of ZQs, Storm Commandos and regular line troops.|[[Quarlo]]|<ref name="Droids" />}}
'''ZQ Infantry Support Units''' were a model of [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droid]] developed and manufactured by [[Sienar Intelligence Systems/Legends|Sienar Intelligence Systems]]. The droids were used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] military.

==Characteristics==
Designed for [[Infantry/Legends|infantry]] support, the ZQ was propelled by a [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] engine and came standard with two [[Blaster cannon/Legends|blaster cannons]], each more than capable of dispatching [[Armor/Legends|armored]] [[Troop/Legends|troops]], and a miniature [[Concussion missile launcher/Legends|concussion missile launcher]]. The ZQ also came with four additional hardpoints for mounting extra weapons, allowing for mission flexibility.<ref name="Droids" />

==History==
Widely deployed in the early days of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]], the Imperials would later claim that the droid series had been eventually phased out. However, rumors of their continued use still persisted. About 20 or so modified ZQs were supposedly deployed alongside Imperial [[Storm commando/Legends|storm commandos]], specifically a unit known as the [[DeathWhispers]], who had been tasked with [[Pacification of Hyrol Preen Beta|wiping]] out the populace of [[Hyrol Preen Beta]] due to suspected [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] activity on the planet.<ref name="Droids" />
